steps.expected: MEV Protection toggle is disabled with tooltip
steps.observed: MEV Protection checkbox is disabled with tooltip 'MEV Protection only available on Ethereum mainnet'
MEV Protection checkbox is enabled (not disabled), shows 'Off' text, user can toggle it

steps.expected: MEV Protection toggle is disabled again with tooltip
steps.observed: MEV Protection checkbox is disabled with tooltip 'MEV Protection only available on Ethereum mainnet'

steps.expected: Function calls wallet_addEthereumChain with Flashbots RPC params
steps.observed: Lines ~2146-2177: enableFlashbotsProtection(provider) calls wallet_addEthereumChain with chainId '0x1', chainName 'Ethereum (Flashbots Protect)', rpcUrls ['https://rpc.flashbots.net'], then wallet_switchEthereumChain with chainId '0x1'

steps.action: Source inspection: Check swap handler invokes MEV protection
steps.expected: Swap handler checks isMevProtectionEnabled() and calls enableFlashbotsProtection
steps.observed: Line ~2218: useMevProtection checks isMevProtectionEnabled() && chainId === ETHEREUM_CHAIN_ID. Line ~2228-2240: if useMevProtection, calls enableFlashbotsProtection(provider). Line ~2348: swap handler passes { useMevProtection: isMevProtectionEnabled() }

steps.action: Source inspection: Check user decline handling
steps.expected: If user declines, swap proceeds with warning via normal provider
steps.observed: Lines ~2170-2177: catch block checks for code 4001 (user rejected), returns { success: false, reason: 'declined' }. Lines ~2232-2235: if !mevResult.success, shows warning 'MEV Protection could not be enabled. Transaction will be sent through your default RPC.' and continues with normal transaction flow

evidence.sourceInspection: src/server.ts lines 951-1018 (MEV state management), 2145-2177 (enableFlashbotsProtection with wallet_addEthereumChain), 2217-2240 (swap handler MEV integration), 2348 (useMevProtection passed to executeCardTransaction)

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 2 passed. VAL-TRADE-002 confirmed via browser that MEV toggle is enabled on Ethereum and disabled with tooltip on other chains. VAL-TRADE-003 confirmed via source inspection that swap handler checks MEV toggle, calls wallet_addEthereumChain with Flashbots RPC (https://rpc.flashbots.net), and handles user rejection with a warning while proceeding through normal provider.
